inputs.label: Defect Rate (DPMO)
inputs.businessContext: Current defects per million opportunities for the process under evaluation.

inputs.label: Current Process Sigma Level
inputs.businessContext: Current sigma level of the process, typically derived from DPMO using standard conversion tables.

inputs.label: Annual Unit Volume
inputs.businessContext: Total number of units produced or transactions processed per year.

inputs.label: Cost per Defect
inputs.businessContext: Average cost incurred per defect, including rework, scrap, warranty, and customer impact.

inputs.label: Estimated Implementation Cost
inputs.businessContext: Total cost to implement the Six Sigma improvement project (training, equipment, downtime, etc.).

inputs.label: Project Risk Level
inputs.businessContext: Qualitative assessment of risk associated with the project (technical complexity, resource availability, stakeholder buy-in).

inputs.label: Strategic Alignment Score
inputs.businessContext: How well the project aligns with organizational strategic goals (1 = low, 10 = high).

inputs.label: Customer Impact Score
inputs.businessContext: Degree of positive impact on customer satisfaction (1 = minimal, 10 = transformative).

inputs.label: Data Confidence Level
inputs.businessContext: Confidence in the accuracy and reliability of the input data (0% = guess, 100% = verified).

rules.message: Extremely low sigma level (<1.5) with positive defect rate; verify DPMO and sigma conversion.
Cost per defect must be greater than zero.
Annual volume must be greater than zero.
High-risk project with high implementation cost; consider phased approach.

thresholds.message: Defect rate exceeds 100,000 DPMO; process is in critical need of improvement.
Project ROI is negative; reconsider project feasibility.
Process sigma below 2.0; immediate action recommended.

formulas.name: Current Annual Defects
formulas.description: Total number of defects per year based on defect rate and volume.

formulas.name: Current Cost of Poor Quality (COPQ)
formulas.description: Annual financial loss due to defects.

formulas.name: Target Defects at 4.5 Sigma
formulas.description: Defects per year if process improves to 4.5 sigma (3.4 DPMO).

formulas.name: Target Cost of Poor Quality
formulas.description: Expected COPQ after improvement to 4.5 sigma.

formulas.name: Annual Savings
formulas.description: Reduction in COPQ from current to target.

formulas.name: Return on Investment (ROI)
formulas.description: Ratio of annual savings to implementation cost, expressed as a percentage.

formulas.name: Project Priority Score
formulas.description: Weighted composite score incorporating financial, strategic, and customer factors, adjusted for risk and data confidence.
formulas.expression: ((annual_savings / 10000) * 0.4 + strategic_alignment * 0.2 + customer_impact * 0.2) * (1 - (case when project_risk = 'high' then 0.3 when project_risk = 'medium' then 0.15 else 0 end)) * (data_confidence / 100)

primary.label: Project Priority Score
primary.description: Overall priority score for the Six Sigma project (higher is better).

hiddenLossDrivers.label: High Defect Rate
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Current defect rate is above 100,000 DPMO, indicating significant hidden factory losses.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Low Sigma Level
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Process sigma below 2.0 suggests excessive variation and waste.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: High Cost of Poor Quality
hiddenLossDrivers.description: COPQ exceeds 10% of revenue (estimated from volume and average unit price).

suggestedActions.label: Implement SPC and DMAIC
suggestedActions.description: Use statistical process control and a structured DMAIC approach to reduce variation and defect rate.

suggestedActions.label: Conduct Root Cause Analysis
suggestedActions.description: Perform a thorough root cause analysis (e.g., fishbone, 5 Whys) to identify primary sources of defects.

suggestedActions.label: Six Sigma Training for Team
suggestedActions.description: Invest in Green Belt or Black Belt training for project team members to ensure effective execution.

suggestedActions.label: Run Pilot Project
suggestedActions.description: Start with a small-scale pilot to validate improvements before full rollout, especially for high-risk projects.
